title: Clear GUI
description: This resource pack adds semi-transparent elements to in-game GUIs for improved utility while also staying stylish.
body:
![Logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/57e1087a263f27e1e3bf182e3028277d8a745da1.png)

### This resource pack overhauls the vanilla GUI to improve visibility while in-game, all while maintaining a stylish design.


The goal of this pack is to enhance visibility while interacting with GUI menus. For instance, if you're browsing your recipes and a creeper sneaks up on you because you didn't notice it behind the GUI. This is especially useful if you're using a higher GUI scale that blocks more of your screen.

![Example GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/04ee0b3d9434a6b47c34ce143c9ab411ca83aab0_0.webp)
